overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a female character with cybernetic arm implants walking through a rainy neon-lit city at night. She traverses wet sidewalks, crosses busy intersections, walks through a concrete underpass, and stops at a street magazine stand to browse.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked city sidewalk at night, surrounded by neon-lit commercial buildings. The wet pavement reflects the colorful artificial lighting, and sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wet asphalt intersection, passing a police officer and other pedestrians, then turns toward a dark concrete underpass. The environment shifts from open street to the enclosed tunnel entrance.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow concrete underpass sheltered from the rain, with graffiti-covered walls and vehicles passing on the adjacent road. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial within the tunnel.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass and stops at a sidewalk magazine stand, browsing the colorful publications displayed on a metal rack. She then leans on a metal guard railing next to an overflowing trash can, looking out over the neon-lit wet street below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked neon metropolis that shifts from open city streets into a claustrophobic underpass before returning to a sidewalk vantage point. It begins by trailing the character along a wet sidewalk where colorful commercial lights reflect off the pavement and sparse pedestrians pass by. As she crosses a glistening asphalt intersection, the open urban environment narrows and the lighting dims as the camera follows her into the mouth of a dark concrete underpass. The scene then transitions through the sheltered tunnel, moving past graffiti-covered walls and passing traffic, before emerging back into the rain. Finally, the camera settles as the character stops at a colorful magazine stand and leans against a metal railing to look out over the glowing, wet streets below.
